roles.title: Agentic AI Platform Architect
roles.description: Design, build, and scale enterprise-grade agentic AI platforms: multi-agent orchestration, durable workflows, HITL governance, evaluation, and cost optimization.

industry.label: Enterprise Software & Platform Engineering
industry.summary: This is an internal enterprise AI-platform role — the agentic platform is a horizontal capability that other business units build on. Answers should be framed for large, often regulated enterprises: deep integration with CRM/ERP/DevOps/data ecosystems, enterprise governance, compliance and audit, multi-tenant scale, and FinOps accountability across teams.
focusAreas: Enterprise system integration (CRM, ERP, DevOps, data platforms)
FinOps / cost accountability across business units
AI-first SDLC adoption across the engineering org

roles.title: Senior HR AI Lead
roles.description: Build and lead AI solutions for an enterprise HR function: employee-facing assistants, talent-acquisition copilots, HR knowledge agents, and workforce analytics — in a regulated, Works-Council environment.

industry.label: Energy Sector · Enterprise HR Technology
industry.summary: This role sits inside the HR function of a large multinational energy company, building internal AI solutions for HR colleagues and employees. Frame answers for regulated, data-sensitive enterprise environments: GDPR, Works Council co-determination, HR platform integrations (Workday, SuccessFactors), and the specific responsible-AI surface area of employment decisions.
focusAreas: HR platform integrations (Workday, SuccessFactors, ServiceNow HRSD)
Responsible AI for employment decisions (fairness, explainability, audit)
Distributed India team building & engineering culture
